visual: Explosive Chen-style fā jìn release: coils back then launches a fast straight punch from a bow stance with the opposite hand pulling sharply to the hip.
motion_description: The motion begins with a high right knee lift followed by a downward stomp to establish a low, wide stance. The torso slowly rotates to the right, shifting weight onto the bent right leg while drawing the right fist to the hip and extending the left hand forward at chest level. After this deliberate wind-up, the weight shifts rapidly into the front left leg as the right fist thrusts an explosive straight punch forward, simultaneously pulling the left hand sharply back to the hip while the torso snaps back to a forward-facing orientation.
